LightningComponentBundle.description: Shared section wrapper with a numbered heading and scroll-reveal.

property.name: sectionId
property.label: Section Id (anchor)
property.description: Anchor id used for nav links and smooth scrolling, e.g. about.

property.name: sectionNumber
property.label: Section Number
property.description: Two-digit ordinal shown before the title, e.g. 01.
